titleStmt.title: SII 9.519: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 519. (A.R. No. 76 of 1912.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN FRONT OF THE BHOGESVARA TEMPLE AT KONAKONDLA, GOOTY TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1448, Pārthiva, Kārtika, ba. 7, Maṅgaḷavāra, corresponding to A.D. 1525 November 7, Tuesday, in the reign of Kṛishṇadēva-Mahārāya. It records that, under the orders of the king, Kottanara Rāmarāja made a gift of land to certain persons (names lost) of Koṇḍakundi for constructing a tank in the village and for its supervision.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīgaṇādhipata[ēṁ namaḥ .] namastuṁgaśiraścuṁ
bicaṁdracāmaracāravē trayilōkyanegarāraṁbha
mūlastaṁbhāya śambhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudaya
sālivāhanaśakhavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1448 neya pārthiva
saṁvatsarada kārtika ba 7 maṁgaḷavāradalu svasti samastabhūva
nāśraya śrīmatprithvīvallabhaṁ śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratā
pa śrīkṛṣṇadēvamahārāyaṁgaḷige Arapenāyakara nirūpadiṁde
rājaiyagaḷu kottanara rāmarājagaḷu koṁḍakuṁdiya
gauṁḍa voḍeyaṁgaḷu kereya kaṭuvali nāḍa
dāriyalu kaṭisida kerege ka
ḷigada yereya hola bījavari
koṭa dasavaṁda yakaṁge māḍida gade kaṁḍuga
dasavaṁdha 1 yikuḷada gade gadeU nimage bhūdāna
kereya keḷage koṭa yere tōṭa ka 1 yiṣṭanu
māḍisikoṁḍu niṁma kereyanu rekame māḍikoṁḍu nīu niṁma putra
pāra caṁdrārkastāyigaḷāgi sukhadiṁda Anubha
yidake Ārobaru tapidavana
gaḷali liṁgapratiṣṭeyanaḷida pāpake hōharu mātā
pitrugaḷa vāraṇāsiyalu vadhiyisida pāpakke hōharu gōbrāhma
ra koṁda pāpake hōharu śrīrāmanāmake tappida pāpakke hōharu
śrīrāmanāmada sākṣi . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ śaṣṭhi
rvaruṣasahasrāṇi vriṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . svadattādviguṇaṁ pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁ pa
radattānapālanāṁ paradattāpahārēṇa niṣphalaṁ bhavētu . yisa
sāvantanakōṭe rāmarājagaḷa voppa rāmayavrālu . śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 9.519 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
